title: spelta vulgaris
intro: Spelta vulgaris, also known as wild spelt or bearded spelt, is a type of ancient grain that belongs to the wheat family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antifungal, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Spelta vulgaris include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Spelta vulgaris include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, colds, and flu.
